name: vibebuilder-codex-skill-router
description: GPT-5.6 native-first Codex skill router for lean specialist selection, safe global installation, and fixture-backed evals.

interface.shortDescription: Choose the smallest safe Codex skill combination.
interface.longDescription: A GPT-5.6 native-first Codex plugin that leaves ordinary work to the model, explicitly routes skill and harness tasks, installs a compact global contract, and validates routing behavior with train and held-out fixtures.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $codex-skill-router to audit this Codex skill setup and return the smallest safe specialist combination.
